# thoth_evidence_bundle (Data Source)

Reads the exported evidence bundle for a specific session.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `session_id` (String) Target session ID.

### Read-Only

- `bundle_hash` (String) Deterministic bundle hash for integrity checks.
- `exported_at` (String) Bundle export timestamp.
- `response_json` (String) Full evidence bundle response payload as JSON.
- `summary_json` (String) Bundle summary object as JSON.
